---
title: "Why LSTMs Work for Streamflow (and When They Don't)"
author: "Kyle Cahitas"
date: 2026-01-15
categories: [hydrology, deep-learning, Python]
description: "A practitioner's walkthrough of training an LSTM on CAMELS basin data."
image: figures/loss-curve.png
---

## Setup

```{{python}}
import torch
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
